title: Efficacy of proton pump inhibitor (PPI) therapy in treating sleep disturbances in patients with gastroesopahgeal reflux disease (GERD): a systematic review and meta-analysis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"a8ab3","text":"The review question: What is the clinical effectiveness of proton pump inhibitor (PPI) therapy on sleep","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8sh0m","text":"disturbances in patients with gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD)?","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cbvmm","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2gsie","text":"The following databases should be use: CENTRAL; MEDLINE; EMBASE; WHO-ICTRP; ClinicalTrials.gov.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1ifcl","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aduo7","text":"Types of study to be included: Prospective, randomized controlled trials describing PPI therapy for patients with GERD and sleep disturbances will be assessed for eligibility. Crossover studies, cluster","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1s1ot","text":"randomized studies, will be excluded. Studies conducted by quasi-experimental methods will be excluded. Retrospective studies will be excluded. No exclusion will be made for observation periods.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"26d0q","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cfkds","text":"Main outcome(s): Change in sleep time and quality.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bng2c","text":"Additional outcome(s): Change in pH impedance parameters (acid exposure, number of refluxes episodes); Change in reflux symptoms; All adverse events: Proportion of people who developed an adverse event according to the original author's definition.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7tsh4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3actn","text":"We will perform meta-analysis of the above outcomes using random effect models.Besides, we will assess heterogeniety and publication bias.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: fahmi_shibli
